mapper.sql: id, job_id, process_id, process_seq, employee_id, employee_name, in_qty, out_qty, defect_qty, start_time, finish_time, is_outsource, outsource_id, process_status, release_by, release_time, fail_handle_type, loss_qty, loss_exceed, source_route_item_id, is_inserted, insert_reason, is_skipped, skip_reason, is_rework, rework_source_process_id, qc_required, needle_check_required, loss_tracked, piece_wage_applicable, create_by, create_time, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_produce_job_process ( job_id, process_id, process_seq, employee_id, employee_name, in_qty, out_qty, defect_qty, start_time, finish_time, is_outsource, outsource_id, process_status, release_by, release_time, fail_handle_type, loss_qty, loss_exceed, source_route_item_id, is_inserted, insert_reason, is_skipped, skip_reason, is_rework, rework_source_process_id, qc_required, needle_check_required, loss_tracked, piece_wage_applicable, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{processId}, #{processSeq}, #{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{inQty}, #{outQty}, #{defectQty}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{isOutsource}, #{outsourceId}, #{processStatus}, #{releaseBy}, #{releaseTime}, #{failHandleType}, #{lossQty}, #{lossExceed}, #{sourceRouteItemId}, #{isInserted}, #{insertReason}, #{isSkipped}, #{skipReason}, #{isRework}, #{reworkSourceProcessId}, #{qcRequired}, #{needleCheckRequired}, #{lossTracked}, #{pieceWageApplicable}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_produce_job_process SET job_id = #{jobId}, process_id = #{processId}, process_seq = #{processSeq}, employee_id = #{employeeId}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, in_qty = #{inQty}, out_qty = #{outQty}, defect_qty = #{defectQty}, start_time = #{startTime}, finish_time = #{finishTime}, is_outsource = #{isOutsource}, outsource_id = #{outsourceId}, process_status = #{processStatus}, release_by = #{releaseBy}, release_time = #{releaseTime}, fail_handle_type = #{failHandleType}, loss_qty = #{lossQty}, loss_exceed = #{lossExceed}, source_route_item_id = #{sourceRouteItemId}, is_inserted = #{isInserted}, insert_reason = #{insertReason}, is_skipped = #{isSkipped}, skip_reason = #{skipReason}, is_rework = #{isRework}, rework_source_process_id = #{reworkSourceProcessId}, qc_required = #{qcRequired}, needle_check_required = #{needleCheckRequired}, loss_tracked = #{lossTracked}, piece_wage_applicable = #{pieceWageApplicable}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, remark = #{remark}, id = id WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_erp_produce_job_process WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_erp_produce_job_process WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY process_seq ASC

SELECT FROM t_erp_produce_job_process WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND ( process_status IS NULL OR process_status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'WAIT_CHECK', 'OUTSOURCE', 'FAIL') ) ORDER BY CASE process_status WHEN 'RUNNING' THEN 1 WHEN 'WAIT_CHECK' THEN 2 WHEN 'FAIL' THEN 3 WHEN 'OUTSOURCE' THEN 4 WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END, process_seq ASC LIMIT 1
